name: food-expiry-tracker-server
description: Basic Express backend for the Food Expiry Tracker project.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config/database.js && node --check src/config/env.js && node --check src/data/foods.data.js && node --check src/utils/food.utils.js && node --check src/middleware/errorHandler.js && node --check src/middleware/notFoundHandler.js && node --check src/middleware/requestLogger.js && node --check src/routes/api.routes.js && node --check src/routes/food.routes.js && node --check src/routes/health.routes.js && node --check test/api.test.js
